Intraday post (05/Jan)

Weekly post:

Challenges for 2026 | Weekly post (05 - 09/Jan)

Soon I will drop a post updating the earlier “AI bubble” post. A lot of challanges are coming for 2026…

Now, let’s jump in to the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Volatility is sold into both ways. Net speed profile is slightly more negative, vol of vol is sold into both direction.

The centroid of the profile is at 6859.74, this is a sticky level.

Upside pivot is at 6889.19upside target is at 6920.55The pivot into the PM session become harder to break as time passes, providing an even higher chance for a reversion towards teh centroid.The upside target is also sticky, with margin of error of 6930

Downside pivot is almsot right at the centroid, with downside target of 6824.52that is locally sticky and pinning, if price hold below 6828 into the power hour.Margin of error is 6810, providing a small reversion possibility.

But the primal bet is a range around the centroid. The secondary is an upward move…
